TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
224 
PHRMCY_PAHP_MOS 
LABEL: 
Pharmacy Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan (PAHP) Months 
DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a Pharmacy Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan (PAHP) 
Managed Care Plan in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: PHRMCY_PAHP_MOS 
LONG NAME: PHRMCY_PAHP_MOS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
FILE(S): 
Managed Care 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual
